items.title: I scraped live betting odds from 9 countries and never once hit a real anti-bot wall
items.description: I just shipped a horse-racing odds tracker across 9 countries. Four totally different site architectures, zero paid proxies, zero headless browsers, zero CAPTCHAs solved. Every "protected" data source I hit turned out to be a public API hiding in plain sight. Here's what actually worked.
